categories.label: Named attorney portrait(s)
categories.composition: chest-up, looking directly at camera, neutral or office background, professional suit, confident but approachable expression
categories.notes: No gavel, scales-of-justice, or law-book props. The attorney's face is the trust signal, not a legal icon.

categories.label: Client testimonial photos
categories.composition: head-and-shoulders, candid or lightly posed, real client where consent exists
categories.notes: Tie each photo to a case type and outcome where possible. If no client photos are available, render initials-avatar placeholders rather than stock people.

categories.label: Team / staff group photo
categories.composition: group shot, office or exterior signage background, everyone looking at camera
categories.notes: Used for multi-attorney or multi-office firms on the About page.

categories.label: Office exterior / signage
categories.composition: wide shot including firm signage, clean and professional
categories.notes: Supports local trust and multi-office location pages.

categories.label: Press / as-seen-in logos
categories.composition: logo only, transparent or white background
categories.notes: If no national press exists, substitute local news features or bar association recognitions. Falls back to trust_badges if none found.
